data.name: 今日起你就進性處理科啦！
data.detailed_description:
◆遊戲說明

觀察面前的女孩，
將符合要求的人“分配”到崗位！
被分配到崗位的女孩將負責男性員工的性需求。
不斷分配女孩，提高男性員工的積極性！

◆分配到性處理科的員工可以「召喚」！

隨時隨地都可以召喚他們進行性處理！
分配大量喜歡的女孩，
打造屬於自己的性處理科吧！

◆搭載角色創建功能！

分配的員工可以隨意更改外貌
通過胸部控制，可以自由調整貧乳或巨乳！
還有髮型、髮色、眼鏡、陰毛有無、輪廓調整等各種選項！

◆搭載更衣功能

通過關卡獲得的服裝和飾品可在性處理過程中隨時更換
除了OL服裝外，還有束縛服裝、橡膠服裝、便服等
眼罩和前作大受好評的鎖鏈等
穿上喜歡的服裝享受性處理吧♪
每件服裝都可以穿脫
更衣會反映在所有的色情場景中。

◆搭載自由相機

在性愛過程中，可以使用自由相機調整自己喜歡的位置和角度！
隨時從自己喜歡的角度欣賞女孩的樣子吧！

◆自動模式下也可進行放置性愛

通過設置自動模式和背景播放，也可進行放置性愛！
放手享受性愛的過程吧！
本作還實裝了「時間停止」功能！
根據插入時和抽插時的表情，可以停止時間，
仔細欣賞喜歡的瞬間！
還有抽插速度調整功能！

data.short_description: 你被任命為性處理科的領導。 與公司最漂亮的後輩「佐藤信乃」一起完成性處理科的工作， 但每天都在為自己無法完成性處理而苦惱。 某天，信乃也意識到自己是性處理科的一員，開始坦然面對。 利用自己的職位，在夜晚的辦公室裡，與後輩開始了秘密的性處理科工作……
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel I5 4690 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-4790K / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 2060 / RX 5700
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Let's Start Managing the Sexual Relief Department!
data.detailed_description:
◆Game Instructions

Observe randomly generated girls,
and “assign” those who meet the requirements to positions!
Girls assigned to positions will be responsible for the sexual needs of male employees.
Keep assigning girls to increase the motivation of male employees!

◆Employees assigned to the sex education class can be “summoned”!

You can summon them anytime, anywhere for sexual relief!
Assign lots of girls you like,
and create your own sexual relief department!

◆Features character creation!

Assigned employees can freely change their appearance.
You can freely adjust breast size from small to large using the chest control!
There are also various options such as hairstyle, hair color, glasses, pubic hair, and contour adjustment!

◆Equipped with a changing function

Clothes and accessories obtained by clearing stages can be changed at any time during sex scenes.
In addition to office lady outfits, there are also bondage outfits, rubber outfits, casual outfits, and more.
Eye masks and chains, which were very popular last time, are also available.
Enjoy sex scenes while wearing your favorite outfits♪
Each outfit can be put on and taken off.
The outfit changes will be reflected in all sex scenes.

◆Equipped with a free camera

During sex, you can use the free camera to adjust to your favorite position and angle!
Enjoy the girl's appearance from your favorite angle at any time!

◆You can also enjoy sex in automatic mode.

By setting automatic mode and background playback, you can also enjoy sex!
Let go and enjoy the process of sex!
This game also features a “time stop” function!
You can stop time based on the expressions during insertion and thrusting,
and carefully enjoy your favorite moments!
There is also a thrusting speed adjustment function!

data.short_description: One day, Sinano also realized that she was a member of the sexual relief department and began to face it calmly. Using my own position, I began secret sexual relief department work with my junior colleagues in the office at night...
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel I5 4690 / AMD FX 8350
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-4790K / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia 2060 / RX 5700
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
